prerequisites: A Workable account with admin access, since API access tokens are generated from account-level Integrations settings.

Your account subdomain (account_subdomain), which is the first part of the URL shown when you are signed in to Workable (for example the <account_subdomain> in https://<account_subdomain>.workable.com).
An API access token (api_key) generated from the Workable Integrations settings, with the scopes required for the data you want to read.
A start date (start_date) marking the earliest point from which to sync records.

authMethods.name: API access token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Authenticate with the api_key secret field, which holds a Workable API access token. The token is sent in the Authorization header using the Bearer scheme (Authorization: Bearer <api_key>). Generate the token under Workable's Integrations settings; it is displayed only once, so store it securely, and note that revoking it immediately disables any integration using it.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API access token in Workable
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Workable as an admin and open the Integrations settings from the top-right menu. Choose to generate a new token, select the scopes appropriate for the data you intend to read, and copy the token. Workable shows the token only once, so save it securely before leaving the page.

setupSteps.title: Find your account subdomain
setupSteps.body: Your account subdomain is the first part of the URL you see when signed in to Workable (the <account_subdomain> in https://<account_subdomain>.workable.com). This value is also used to form the API base URL https://<account_subdomain>.workable.com/spi/v3/.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set account_subdomain to your Workable subdomain, set api_key to the access token you generated, and set start_date to the earliest date from which records should be synced. All three fields are required.
